'''Rogue Squadron Base''' was a cave hangar facility used by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] on [[Cilpar]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The makeshift facilities were located 'west of [[Kiidan]]'. [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] nicknamed them "the barn".
